text:
<@&1424461167883194418> Model updates — 2026-07-22

### 🆕 New
- 🧠 **GPT-OSS 20B** (OpenAI) — tool calling + reasoning
- 🧠 **Gemma 4 31B** (Google) — vision, tools + reasoning
- 🧠 **Grok 4.5** (xAI) — vision, tools + reasoning
- 🧠 **Perplexity Sonar High-Context Search** (Perplexity) — web search
- 🧠 **Kimi K3** (Moonshot AI) — vision, tools + reasoning
- 🧠 **MiMo V2.5** / **MiMo V2.5 Pro** (Xiaomi) — tools + reasoning
- 🧠 **Qwen3.7 Max** (Qwen) — tools + reasoning
- 🎨 **Sana Sprint 1.6B** (NVIDIA) — text-to-image
- 🎬 **Veo 3.1 Fast 1080p** (Google) — image input, start/end frames + audio output
- 🎬 **HappyHorse 1.1** (Alibaba) — image input + start-frame video

### 🗑️ Removed
- `perplexity-deep` (text)
- `ltx-2` (video)
- `acestep` (audio)

### ⬇️ Price cuts
- 🎨 Image: Klein (~50% off)
- 🎬 Video: Veo (~45% off)
- 🧠 Text: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, Luna (~35%); Qwen Large (~20%); GLM 5.2 (~55%); Claude Sonnet 4.6 (~65%)

### ⬆️ Price increases
- 🎨 Image: Flux (~15% more) · Z-Image (~100% more)
- 🧠 Text: Falcon H1 Tiny (~900% more) · DeepSeek V3.2 (~55% more)

### ✨ Capability updates
- `gemini-fast` — added audio input
- `stable-audio-3-medium` · `stable-audio-3-large` — added audio input
- `cohere-embed-v4` — added image input

Explore at https://gen.pollinations.ai/docs
